title: ABVMU UP GNM Entrance Test UPGET 2026 Application Form

detail.title: ABVMU UP GNM Entrance Test UPGET 2026 Application Form
detail.short_info: ABVMU UP GNM Entrance Test UPGET 2026 Application Online Form is open from 29 April to 26 May 2026. Check important dates, eligibility, application fee, how to apply, exam pattern, and syllabus for UPGET 2026 GNM admission.

sections.heading: ABVMU UP GNM Entrance Test UPGET 2026 Application Form

content.text: ABVMU UP GNM Entrance Test UPGET 2026 Application Online Form is now available from 29 April 2026 to 26 May 2026. Atal Bihari Vajpayee Medical University (ABVMU), Uttar Pradesh is conducting the Uttar Pradesh GNM Entrance Test (UPGET) 2026 for admission to the 3-year GNM (General Nursing and Midwifery) course in Government and Private nursing institutions across Uttar Pradesh.

ABVMU UP GNM Entrance Test UPGET 2026 Application Online Form has been released by Atal Bihari Vajpayee Medical University, Uttar Pradesh. Interested candidates can submit the online application from 29 April 2026 to 26 May 2026 for admission into the 3-year GNM Nursing course for the academic session 2026-29.

The entrance exam will be held on 16 June 2026. This guide provides complete details including important dates, eligibility criteria, application fee, step-by-step application process, exam pattern, syllabus, and direct links to help aspirants successfully fill the ABVMU UP GNM Entrance Test UPGET 2026 Application Online Form and secure admission in reputed GNM training centres in Uttar Pradesh.
Direct Link to Open ABVMU UP GNM Entrance Test UPGET 2026 Notification: Click Here

rows: Atal Bihari Vajpayee Medical University (ABVMU), Uttar Pradesh

sections.heading: ABVMU UP GNM Entrance Test UPGET 2026 Eligibility Criteria

rows: 10+2 with English and minimum 40% marks (5% relaxation for SC/ST)
10+2 with Vocational ANM or Healthcare Science with 40% marks
UP Domicile or passed 10th & 12th from Uttar Pradesh (for Government seats)

content.text: Payment Mode: Online through Debit Card, Credit Card, Net Banking or UPI. Fee once paid is non-refundable.

sections.heading: How to Apply for ABVMU UP GNM Entrance Test UPGET 2026

items: Visit the official website abvmucet26.co.in or www.abvmuup.edu.in
Click on UP GNM Entrance Test (UPGET) 2026 link
Complete Candidate Registration with personal details and verify via OTP
Login using Registration ID and Password
Fill the application form in stages (Personal, Address, Education, Centre Preference)
Upload scanned documents, photo, signature and verification sheet
Pay the application fee online
Preview and submit the form
Download and print the confirmation page

sections.heading: ABVMU UP GNM Entrance Test UPGET 2026 Exam Pattern

content.text: Duration: 140 Minutes (2 Hours 20 Minutes) Mode: Offline (OMR Sheet) Medium: English & Hindi (Bilingual) Marking: +1 for each correct answer Negative Marking: No negative marking

sections.heading: Documents Required for ABVMU UP GNM 2026

items: Passport size photograph with name and date
Scanned signature
10th and 12th marksheet
Caste/Category certificate (if applicable)
Domicile certificate (for Government seats)
Aadhaar Card
Verification proforma (hand-filled and scanned)
